overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The vehicle navigates from covered highways through busy intersections and dark industrial alleys, showcasing the game's cyberpunk aesthetic with heavy use of cyan and magenta neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban highway underpass with red structural beams

events.description: vehicle exits covered overpass into open urban intersection

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through the covered highway section approaching the city exit

entered.detail: concrete and steel highway overpass with red structural support beams overhead
painted red steel girders supporting the overhead highway structure
yellow lane dividers and white directional arrows on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels through a covered urban highway underpass characterized by heavy concrete pillars and red steel support beams. The lighting is artificial and dim, with the road ahead illuminated by headlights. The segment ends as the car approaches the exit into the open city.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with towering digital billboards

events.description: vehicle stops at red traffic light at major intersection
driver looks left out window at billboard then begins left turn

agents.ego_description: stopped at the intersection, looking around at the surrounding billboards and traffic before preparing to turn

notable_agents.action: white sedan passing through the intersection on the cross street

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated ORBITAL AIR signage near the top
large vertical digital screen displaying MINDFUCK advertisement with punk aesthetic
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the underpass into a vast neon-lit intersection dominated by the Orbital Air tower and massive digital billboards. The car stops at a red light, allowing the driver to observe the cyberpunk cityscape before initiating a left turn.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city street with heavy advertising and palm tree landscaping

events.description: accelerating through the intersection following a red sports car

agents.ego_description: accelerating down the multi-lane street, following traffic flow past illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining speed

entered.detail: multiple large electronic screens displaying advertisements on building facades
illuminated building signage reading PALM VIEW on distant skyscraper
concrete dividers separating lanes and protecting pedestrian areas

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates through the commercial district, following a red sports car past towering digital billboards and neon-lit storefronts. The street is lined with palm trees and concrete barriers, with the Orbital Air tower now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial back alley with steam vents and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: turns off main road into narrow industrial alleyway with steam vents
steam from vents creates localized fog effect reducing visibility

agents.ego_description: navigating slowly through the narrow alley, avoiding obstacles and steam vents

entered.detail: ground-level vents releasing white steam into the alley atmosphere
concrete walls covered in colorful street art and tagging
purple neon tubes illuminating the right side of the alley
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking off sections

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns into a narrow industrial alleyway characterized by steam vents, graffiti-covered walls, and purple neon lighting. The atmosphere is dense with artificial fog from the vents, creating a claustrophobic cyberpunk environment distinct from the open main streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: building service entrance with bright cyan and pink neon lighting

events.description: vehicle comes to complete stop at building entrance
camera briefly exits vehicle to show exterior view of neon-lit entrance

agents.ego_description: stopped at the destination, observing the neon-lit entrance and nearby pedestrians before looking out the side window

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing near the entrance, illuminated by cyan neon light

entered.detail: bright cyan neon tubes framing the building entrance doorway
magenta neon signage above the entrance casting pink light
chain-link fencing with metal posts securing the left side of the entrance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at a building entrance dramatically lit by cyan and pink neon lights. The driver observes pedestrians gathered near the entrance before briefly looking out the side window, revealing the exterior perspective of the neon-framed doorway and security fencing.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown city streets with heavy commercial signage

events.description: accelerating away from the building entrance back into traffic
merging with traffic flow at intersection

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the city streets, navigating through moderate traffic and passing large digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving parallel in the adjacent lane

entered.detail: large curved digital screen displaying DAKIMBO advertisement with food imagery
cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates away from the neon-lit building, rejoining the main city streets. The drive continues through the downtown area, passing the Dakimbo billboard and navigating alongside other vehicles, with the illuminated skyscraper skyline dominating the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from a dim, enclosed underpass into a sprawling neon metropolis before dipping into a claustrophobic industrial alley. It begins beneath a covered urban highway of concrete pillars and red steel beams, moving forward until the vehicle emerges into a vast intersection dominated by the Orbital Air tower and massive digital billboards. As the car accelerates through the commercial district past palm trees and neon storefronts, the scene shifts abruptly when the vehicle turns into a narrow alleyway filled with steam vents, graffiti, and purple lighting. The camera then slows to a stop at a building entrance framed by dramatic cyan and pink neon, observing pedestrians and security fencing before accelerating away. Finally, the vehicle rejoins the main downtown streets, navigating through traffic beneath a towering, illuminated skyscraper skyline.
